text: FROM ubuntu:22.04 ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive ENV JAVA_HOME=/us r/ib/ jvn/ java-11-open;dk-andsd/ RUN apt-get update & apt-get install -y \ g+ build-essential autoconf autonake n4 libtool gcc make unzip wget swig \ openjdk-11-jdk ant Libpo-dev gdal-bin Libgdal-dev && \ apt clean 6 \ m —rf /var/cache/apt/* & \ m —rf /var/Uib/apt/Uists/x WORKDIR /tnp # Install libecwj2 (EQW 3.3 SOK) RUN wget https: //github. con/bogind/ Libecwj2-3.3/ raw/naster/ Libecwj2-3.3-2006-09-06. 2ip \ # 6 wget http://trac.0sgeo.org/gdal/raw-at tachment/ticket/3162/ Libecwj2-3. 3-nsve90-fixes. patch \ 66 wget https://raw.githubusercontent. con/makinacorpus, ibecw/master/ Libecuj2-3. 3-nsvc90-f ixes.patch \ 86 unzip libecwj2-3.3-2006-09-06.2ip \ & patch —po<_Libecuj2-3.3-nsvc90—fixes.patch \ 6 cd libecwj2-3.3 \ & /configure \ 55 nake \ 56 nake install \ s cd .. # Install gdal 3.5.3 RUN wget http://dounload.osgeo.org/gdal/3.5.3/gdal-3.5.3. tar.gz \ 86 tar —xvf gdal-3.5.3.tar.gz \ 6 cd gdal-3.5.3 \ # 86 ./configure —-with-ecw=/usr/local —with-python \ 6 ./configure —with-ecw=/usr/local —with-java=/usr/1ib/jvn/java-11-openjk-andsd \ 55 nake \ 58 make install # Install gdal java bindings RUN cd /tnp/gdal-3.5.3/swig/java \ & nake veryclean && make generate && make build \ & cp libgdalalljni.so /usr/lib/ \ §&cd /e RUN echo "export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/Lib' >> ~/.profile \ & echo 'export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/Lib' >> ~/.bashrc \ 58 deonfig RUN echo 'GDAL_DATA="/usr/local/share/gdal"" > /etc/environnent \ & echo 'PATH="/usr/local/sbin: /usr/local/bin: /usr/sbin: /usr/bin:/sbin: /bin: /usr/ganes: /usr/local/ganes" " >> /etc/ environnent
